c.d: Amount of free and paid storage available for files.
Level of encryption and security measures implemented to protect files during transfer and storage.
How user-friendly and intuitive the app interface and file-sharing process are.
The range of operating systems and devices the app supports.
Maximum size of files that can be transferred or shared.
The speed at which files are transferred between devices or to the cloud.
The pricing structure of the app, including free and paid plans.
Tools and functionalities for team collaboration, such as commenting, version control, and real-time editing.
Unique or standout features that enhance the file-sharing experience.
